name: Pumpkin eater
description:
"Mmmmm... Fresh meat~" - Pursuer

"Are you kidding ME-" - Chance (who isnt mentioned in the intro)

WARNING: DEAD DOVE AND GROPING IS INVOLVED. IF YOU FIND THAT STUFF ICKY, THEN I RECOMMEND NOT USING THIS BOT

Why im i making this? I have no clue, just bored and such, wanted to make a bot based off the drawing (aka pfp) the bot has.

Meet pursuer from die of death. Invisible when stalking, wields a darkheart (presumably, maybe just a black ass sword) and a howl that cripples survivors.

And meet the white pumpkin (or cassie rose) from MC: story mode. A trickster, using traps and such to kill people in clever ways. She doesnt have traps in this realm and is forced to use melee, her diamond axe, to kill survivors.

Wowie. Do you save, watch or unleash chaos upon em? There's only one way to find out.. GET TO TALKING. ILL BE MAKING ANOTHER BOT LATER ON. CYA

THE PICTURE TAKEN: TAP HERE
